summary: A nearly 5-minute NBC News / TODAY Show segment ('TODAY' and 'NBC NEWS' branding, 'NEW STEPS TO FIGHT GIFT CARD FRAUD' chyron) reported by Vicky Nguyen on gift-card draining fraud, including studio anchors, an interview, and surveillance B-roll of suspects in stores, referencing ICE's Project Red Hook and acting director Todd Lyons. It is a recorded broadcast news package, not an agency-produced music-driven spectacle, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: NEW STEPS TO FIGHT GIFT CARD FRAUD; TODAY; NBC NEWS; TARGET
